text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I let my mind wander during training<n>again. The
park holds far too many<n>temptations...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Puppies running around... kittens<n>sharpening their
claws... Agh!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
No, the environment is not to blame.<n>The fault
lies with my mind's fragility.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
And the remedy—building tolerance<n>with animal
encyclopedias!
